title: Move sprite-regen to clunger static code

log.context: Move sprite-regen to clunger static code

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`** — `notifySpriteTie()` function:
- Removed the second `fetch` call that injected `[sprite-regen] ${pollId}` as a Discord message to BigClungus
- Replaced it with `Bun.spawn(["/bin/bash", "/mnt/data/scripts/regen-sprites.sh", persona])` — clunger strips the `sprite-` prefix from the poll ID and spawns the script directly as a background process
- The `.exited` promise handler logs stdout/stderr and injects a success ...(truncated)
